reviewer_issues.reviewer_concern: Small and unbalanced experience groups limit interaction reliability.
reviewer_issues.action: Supplement low-experience participants and report before/after balance.

reviewer_issues.reviewer_concern: Gender was recorded but not included in the analysis.
reviewer_issues.action: Include Gender in main models and report sensitivity.

reviewer_issues.reviewer_concern: Multiple conditions may introduce fatigue or carryover effects.
reviewer_issues.action: Model block and position; report trial-order diagnostics.

reviewer_issues.reviewer_concern: Only three WWR levels cannot strongly identify a nonlinear optimum.
reviewer_issues.action: Use trend/planned contrasts and soften optimality claims.
Report AOI area, visited rate, and AOI-level sample coverage.
Generate claim strength table and downgrade weak claims.
